column2: so its binary is larger than the single-engine

column1: # esp32/esp32-classic builds and overflowed the shared 1.875 MB app slot in
# partitions_otgw_esp32.csv (101%
# swaps the app/fs split: 2.0 MB app + 1.875 MB LittleFS. The shared table is left
# UNTOUCHED so OTA upgrades of existing esp32/esp32-classic devices keep their
# LittleFS at the original 0x1F0000 offset (no filesystem-data corruption).
# 4MB flash layout (TASK-867: app grown +0.375 MB for the ArduinoJson v7 footprint
# on top of the both-engines combo binary):
#   2.375 MB app (ota_0) + 1.5 MB LittleFS (label "spiffs") + 64 KB coredump
#   Matches the shared esp32 table's split now (both are 2.375/1.5); web assets
#   use ~0.95 MB so 1.5 MB LittleFS is comfortable.
# Bootloader: 0x0 (ESP32-S3 specific — differs from original ESP32 which uses 0x1000)
# Name
nvs
otadata
app0
spiffs
coredump
